sharedEntities.description: Core loan data entity representing loan contracts, statuses, and sale information flowing from ingestion to processing and analytics
Agreement terms between CRB and partners with effective dates, ingested and transformed for analytics
Fee structures and parameters for loans used in collection processing and analytics
Interest rate information and accrual records for loan processing and analysis
Marketplace Lender entities with configuration for data processing and orchestration

dataFlows.name: Loan Data Processing Pipeline
dataFlows.description: End-to-end flow from raw loan data ingestion to analytics-ready transformed data
steps: Ingest loan data from external sources via cos-lending-selling-ingestion
Transform data using DBT in cos-lending-selling-datatools
Make data available for analytics and reporting

dataFlows.name: SOFR Rate Processing
dataFlows.description: Fetching and integrating SOFR rates for loan interest calculations
steps: Fetch SOFR rates from Federal Reserve API via cos-lending-selling-ingestion
Process rates in conjunction with loan data using DAGs

dataFlows.name: Servicing Data Integration
dataFlows.description: Processing of loan servicing information for analytics and operations
steps: Ingest servicing data files from S3 via cos-lending-selling-ingestion
Orchestrate data processing via Airflow DAGs

integrationPoints.description: Raw ingested loan, contract, and SOFR data stored in databases for DAG processing
DAGs trigger and orchestrate data transformation processes defined in datatools
Raw servicing data stored in S3 buckets for further processing
Transformed data stored in PostgreSQL warehouse for analytics consumption

patterns.description: Extract-Transform-Load pattern used to process financial data from raw sources to analytics-ready formats
Airflow DAGs used to coordinate complex data processing workflows and dependencies
Centralized repository pattern for transformed data ready for analytics and reporting
Tracking changes to data through timestamps to ensure incremental processing

ambiguities: The specific schema mappings between ServicingValue in cos-lending-selling-ingestion and the Loan entity in cos-lending-selling-dags
The exact trigger mechanisms between completed ingestion in cos-lending-selling-ingestion and DAG execution in cos-lending-selling-dags
The precise nature of the bidirectional Vampire integration referenced in cos-lending-selling-dags and how it relates to the other repos
How the MplBootstrapping configuration in cos-lending-selling-ingestion affects processing in the other repositories
